text: The tilt of the room unsettles my senses, distorting my usual way of grounding myself in space. The openness and quiet amplify a sense of expectancy—a room poised for ideas, yet currently still, like the pause before thought takes shape. In the second scene, the vivid wall and glowing screens suggest innovation and inquiry. Here, I am surrounded by a celebration of development and research; curiosity is nearly palpable, compelling me to ponder the intersection between humanity and technology. I feel invited to reflect deeply on progress, connection, and the ever-shifting nature of knowledge.
